testcase.name: setupDriver

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Could not start a new session. Could not start a new session. Error while creating session with the driver service. Stopping driver service: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: DevToolsActivePort file doesn't exist Host info: host: '6f551a97618c', ip: '172.19.0.2' Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039bd14*' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.18.33.1-microsoft-standard-WSL2', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: driver.version: unknown Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039bd14*' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.18.33.1-microsoft-standard-WSL2', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: driver.version: unknown Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039bd14*' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.18.33.1-microsoft-standard-WSL2', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: driver.version: unknown Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.3' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, platformName: linux}]}] Capabilities {browserName: chrome, platformName: linux}
